generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component collecting real-time data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinSensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data collected from Physical Twin over time"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model based on CAD data for spatial representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance DynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using differential equations for system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for performance and system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm updating model parameters with parameter estimates from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm identifying anomalies using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithm inferring system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm enhancing system efficiency through model simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service evaluating safety and optimal performance of Physical Twin using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, PerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction service simulating Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FutureStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service enhancing system efficiency through parameter adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control service providing automated adjustments via supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service identifying anomalies through fault detection algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service inferring system states from sensor data using state estimators"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateInsight
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for evaluating system safety against operational thresholds"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for assessing system performance against operational thresholds"
]

instance FutureStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight predicting future system states based on simulation models"
]

instance EfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improving system efficiency through optimization"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment action triggered by supervisory controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying anomalies in system behavior"
]

instance StateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight inferring current system states from sensor data"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with best parameter estimates from sensor data; monitors check for safety and optimality violations, triggering corrective actions on the Physical Twin."
]
